message:
fix: pass target URL to agent so it knows what to test

The agent was navigating to random localhost ports because it didn't
know the target URL. Now the initial message includes the target.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+---
+id: cli-smoke
+title: Echo app responds to input
+status: ready
+tags:
+  - smoke
+---
+
+# Echo app responds to input
+
+The echo app should accept user input and echo it back.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- App displays a welcome message
+- App echoes back what the user types

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+---
+id: smoke-test
+title: Page loads and displays content
+status: ready
+tags:
+  - smoke
+---
+
+# Page loads and displays content
+
+Visit the application and verify the page loads successfully.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- Page loads without errors
+- Page displays some content
